title: Port protojure-lib to Pedestal 0.8.1
content:
## Overview

Port the protojure-lib gRPC/Pedestal integration from Pedestal 0.7.2 to 0.8.1. The version bump is already in `project.clj` (commit `8bd393c`) but no corresponding code changes have been made. Pedestal 0.8 has sweeping breaking API changes requiring migration across the library and test harness.

## Background

Pedestal 0.8.0 was a major release that:
- Removed `io.pedestal.http` entirely (replaced by `io.pedestal.connector`)
- Removed `io.pedestal.interceptor.helpers` (including `on-response`)
- Removed `io.pedestal.test` (replaced by `io.pedestal.connector.test`)
- Introduced `io.pedestal.service.protocols/PedestalConnector` as the primary server abstraction
- Deprecated anonymous (unnamed) interceptors

Verified with `lein with-profile dev run -m clojure.main`:
- `io.pedestal.http` → FileNotFoundException (gone)
- `io.pedestal.interceptor.helpers` → FileNotFoundException (gone)
- `io.pedestal.test` → FileNotFoundException (gone)
- `io.pedestal.connector` → loads OK
- `io.pedestal.connector.test` → loads OK
- `io.pedestal.service.interceptors` → loads OK (has `html-body`, `json-body`)
- `->Interceptor` record fields unchanged: `[name enter leave error]`
- `error-dispatch` macro produces **unnamed** interceptor (triggers deprecation warning)

## Files Affected

### Library (`modules/grpc-server/src/protojure/pedestal/`)
- `core.clj` — Major: uses removed `io.pedestal.http` and `io.pedestal.interceptor.helpers`
- `interceptors/grpc.clj` — Minor: `error-dispatch` produces an anonymous interceptor
- `interceptors/authz.clj` — Minor: anonymous interceptor deprecation warning on load

### Test harness (`test/test/protojure/`)
- `test/utils.clj` — Uses removed `io.pedestal.http/create-server` + `start`
- `pedestal_test.clj` — Uses removed `io.pedestal.http` service map pattern
- `grpc_test.clj` — Uses removed `io.pedestal.http` service map pattern
- `grpc_web_test.clj` — Uses removed `io.pedestal.http/create-servlet` and `io.pedestal.test/response-for`

## Detailed Changes

### Issue 1: Fix `core.clj` — New `create-connector` public API

**Remove requires:**
- `[io.pedestal.http :as http]`
- `[io.pedestal.interceptor.helpers :as pedestal.interceptors]`

**Add requires:**
- `[io.pedestal.interceptor :as pedestal.interceptor]`
- `[io.pedestal.service.protocols :as pedestal.protocols]`
- `[io.pedestal.connector.test :as conn.test]`

**Fix `chain-execute`** — replace `on-response` with a manual leave interceptor:
```clojure
(defn chain-execute [request interceptors]
  (p/create
   (fn [resolve reject]
     (let [response-handler (pedestal.interceptor/interceptor
                              {:name ::container
                               :leave (fn [context]
                                        (resolve (:response context))
                                        context)})]
       (pedestal.chain/execute {:request request} (cons response-handler interceptors))))))
```

**Fix `provider`** — change `::http/interceptors` to `:interceptors`:
```clojure
(let [interceptors (:interceptors connector-map)  ; was ::http/interceptors
```

**Add `create-connector`** — new primary public API implementing `PedestalConnector`:
```clojure
(defrecord UndertowConnector [connector-map server-atom]
  pedestal.protocols/PedestalConnector
  (start-connector! [this]
    (.start (:server @server-atom))
    this)
  (stop-connector! [this]
    (.stop (:server @server-atom))
    this)
  (test-request [this ring-request]
    (conn.test/execute-interceptor-chain
      (:initial-context connector-map {})
      (:interceptors connector-map)
      ring-request)))

(defn create-connector
  "Creates a PedestalConnector backed by Undertow HTTP/2.

   Build connector-map with io.pedestal.connector:
     (-> (conn/default-connector-map host port)
         (conn/with-interceptors interceptors)
         (conn/with-routes routes))

   Additional keys:
   - ::thread-pool      : optional custom thread pool
   - :container-options : SSL config {:ssl-port, :keystore, :key-password}"
  [{:keys [host port] :or {host "127.0.0.1"} :as connector-map}]
  (let [thread-pool  (::thread-pool connector-map (threads/get-executor))
        interceptors (:interceptors connector-map)
        connections  (atom {})
        handler      (reify HttpHandler
                       (handleRequest [_ exchange]
                         (handle-request thread-pool interceptors connections exchange)))
        {:keys [ssl-port] :as ssl-config} (:container-options connector-map)
        undertow     (-> (Undertow/builder)
                         (cond->
                           (or (nil? ssl-config) (and port ssl-port))
                           (.addHttpListener port host)
                           (some? ssl-config)
                           (.addHttpsListener (or ssl-port port) host (ssl/keystore-> ssl-config)))
                         (.setServerOption UndertowOptions/ENABLE_HTTP2 true)
                         (.setHandler handler)
                         (.build))]
    (->UndertowConnector connector-map (atom {:server undertow}))))
```

The old `provider` and `config` functions should be removed.

### Issue 2: Fix anonymous interceptors in `grpc.clj`

`error-dispatch` produces an unnamed interceptor. Add `:name` by assoc-ing after creation:
```clojure
(def error-interceptor
  (assoc (err/error-dispatch
          [ctx ex]
          [{:exception-type ::status/error}]
          (let [{:keys [code msg]} (ex-data ex)]
            (err-status ctx code msg))
          :else
          (err-status ctx (grpc.status/get-code :internal) (ex-message ex)))
         :name ::error-interceptor))
```

### Issue 3: Migrate test harness to new connector API

**`test/utils.clj`:**
```clojure
(ns protojure.test.utils
  (:require [clojure.data :as data]
            [io.pedestal.connector :as conn]))

(defn start-connector [connector]
  (conn/start! connector))
```

**`pedestal_test.clj`** — replace service map with connector builder:
```clojure
;; Requires: replace io.pedestal.http with:
[io.pedestal.connector :as conn]
[io.pedestal.service.interceptors :as svc.interceptors]

;; Interceptors: replace http/html-body, http/json-body:
interceptors [(body-params/body-params)
              svc.interceptors/html-body
              svc.interceptors/json-body
              ...]

;; Service setup: replace create-server + start:
(def connector
  (-> (conn/default-connector-map "localhost" port)
      (conn/with-interceptors interceptors)
      (conn/with-routes (into #{} (routes interceptors)))
      (assoc ::core/thread-pool thread-pool
             :container-options {:ssl-port ssl-port
                                 :keystore (io/resource "https/keystore.jks")
                                 :key-password "password"})
      (core/create-connector)))
(conn/start! connector)

;; Teardown: replace http/stop:
(conn/stop! connector)
```

**`grpc_test.clj`** — same pattern:
- Remove `[io.pedestal.http :as pedestal]`
- Add `[io.pedestal.connector :as conn]` and `[io.pedestal.service.interceptors :as svc.interceptors]`
- `pedestal/html-body` → `svc.interceptors/html-body`
- Service setup: connector builder + `conn/start!`
- `pedestal/stop` → `conn/stop!` (including the inline call at line 708 in `test-server-closedetect`)

**`grpc_web_test.clj`** — replace servlet + `response-for`:
```clojure
;; Requires: replace io.pedestal.http + io.pedestal.test with:
[io.pedestal.connector :as conn]
[io.pedestal.connector.test :as conn.test]

;; Service: replace create-servlet with create-connector:
(def service
  (-> (conn/default-connector-map "localhost" 0)
      (conn/with-interceptors interceptors)
      (conn/with-routes (into #{} routes))
      (protojure.pedestal/create-connector)))

;; response-for: new namespace + new call signature:
;; Old: (response-for service :get "/" :headers {...} :body ...)
;; New: (conn.test/response-for service :get "/" :headers {...} :body ...)
;; Note: conn.test/response-for returns :body as String by default (:as :string)
```

## Key API Mapping

| Old (0.7.x) | New (0.8.x) |
|---|---|
| `io.pedestal.http/create-server` + `start` | `core/create-connector` + `conn/start!` |
| `io.pedestal.http/stop` | `conn/stop!` |
| `::http/routes`, `::http/port`, `::http/type`, `::http/chain-provider` | `conn/default-connector-map` + `conn/with-routes` + `core/create-connector` |
| `io.pedestal.http/html-body` | `io.pedestal.service.interceptors/html-body` |
| `io.pedestal.http/json-body` | `io.pedestal.service.interceptors/json-body` |
| `io.pedestal.test/response-for svc-fn :method url ...` | `io.pedestal.connector.test/response-for connector :method url & opts` |
| `io.pedestal.interceptor.helpers/on-response` | Manual `{:name N :leave (fn [ctx] (f (:response ctx)) ctx)}` |
| `::http/interceptors` in service-map | `:interceptors` in connector-map |

## Acceptance Criteria

- `lein with-profile dev compile` succeeds with no errors
- All existing tests pass: `pedestal_test`, `grpc_test`, `grpc_web_test`
- No anonymous interceptor deprecation warnings at load time
- `create-connector` is the documented public API for creating the Undertow server
- `provider` and `config` are removed (they were only wired via the now-deleted `::http/chain-provider` / `::http/type` keys)
